content: For transferred or re-admitted patients an infection is only considered a nosocomial infection if the day of symptom onset is greater than or equal to day 3 of the patient’s  hospital stay, where the day of admission is regarded as day 1. Please see chapter 3.4 of the NeoIPC Surveillance Protocol for the rules.

content: The sum of all antibiotic substance days must be greater than or equal to antibiotic days

data: #{NeoIPC BSI Common sepsis clinical findings count}
d2:daysBetween( V{enrollment_date}, V{event_date} ) + #{NeoIPC Admission on day of life value}

(
  (
    !d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture})
    ||
    (#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture} != true)
  )
  &&
  (
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 value})
  )
  &&
  (
    (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen} == false)
    &&
    (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen} == false)
    &&
    (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen} == false)
  )
)
&&
(
  (
    (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value}) || (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value} != true))
    &&
    (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value}) || (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value} != true))
    &&
    (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value}) || (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value} != true))
    &&
    (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment}) || (#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment} != true))
  )
  &&
  (
    (#{NeoIPC BSI Common commensal once clinical findings count} < 2)
    ||
    (#{NeoIPC BSI Common commensal once laboratory findings count} < 1)
  )
)
